lines.text: Revenue recognized over time using units-of-delivery output measure (completed housing units: 142 units complete) per ASC 606 606-10-25-31, 606-10-55-17, 606-10-55-19.
Contract assets and contract liabilities rollforward disclosed per ASC 606 606-10-45-1, 606-10-45-5, 606-10-50-9, including billings in excess of costs.
Construction revenue disaggregated by project type, geography, and contract duration per ASC 606 606-10-50-5.
